summary:
HEALING AND DELIVERANCE INTERCESSIONS: Brandon conducts intense spiritual warfare and intercession for numerous specific medical and spiritual afflictions. Brandon targets cancers, brain injuries, double ear infections, lung masses, and HIV, commanding complete healing and declaring authority over rebellious cells. Brandon aggressively addresses chemical dependencies, specifically calling out addictions to opioid pills, fentanyl coming across the southern border, and alcoholism, demanding deliverance and hormonal rebalancing in the brain. Brandon stresses that Jesus already bore these sicknesses and that believers must actively speak to their mountains of disease rather than begging God for healing.

GLOBAL ECONOMIC SHIFTS AND COMMODITY WARNINGS: Brandon shares specific prophetic insights regarding global finance and the energy sector. Brandon recounts receiving a warning in May 2022 that oil prices would soar to $200 a barrel, noting that the formation of the BRICS alliance—specifically the inclusion of Saudi Arabia, Russia, Egypt, and the UAE—will control eighty percent of the world's oil wealth by January. Brandon interprets this as a direct threat to the petrodollar, recalling a vision of a hundred-dollar bill splitting down the middle on a flagpole and fading away. Brandon also predicts the initial rollout of a digital dollar, observing that such digital identification and banking restrictions are already manifesting in places like Kenya and Australia.

PROPHETIC TIMELINES AND IMPENDING JUDGMENTS: Brandon details chronological warnings received through divine encounters, including a dream on October 2nd where an angel announced that great judgment was coming in 569 days, though God has since extended a season of grace through intercession. Brandon views the time between Rosh Hashanah 2023 and 2024 as a period of soaring and preparation, while warning that 2025 will release a dam of darkness and sludge, followed by a very serious year of caution in 2026. Furthermore, Brandon anticipates significant geopolitical developments concerning Israel, predicting a two-state solution agreement and the commencement of the third temple's construction, while linking the Great American Eclipse passing over the New Madrid fault to historical judgments whenever America pressures Israel.

SUPERNATURAL ENCOUNTERS AND OPEN EYE VISIONS: Brandon provides detailed accounts of his personal interactions with the spiritual realm, emphasizing that every believer has guardian angels. Brandon shares a profound testimony of receiving a dire medical report, which was miraculously overturned after a massive angel with thick fingers appeared, touched his head, and struck him with a healing jolt of Holy Ghost lightning. Brandon also describes experiencing a terrifying open-eye vision while driving in Oklahoma, where he saw a severe local event manifest in a grocery store parking lot. Brandon emphasizes that the coming years will feature unprecedented supernatural manifestations and prophetic power akin to Elijah calling down fire, outshining even the historic Azusa Street revival.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND MAINTAINING JOY: Brandon instructs his audience on how to navigate the coming turbulence by maintaining a fortress of joy and rejecting the spirit of foreboding. Brandon advises severely limiting news consumption to avoid demonic heaviness, recommending instead that households be filled with praise, worship, and laughter. Brandon teaches the fundamental mechanics of faith, explaining that believers are ambassadors of the Kingdom of God who must use the power of their tongue to decree life and protection. Emphasizing the importance of tithing as a biblical mechanism to rebuke the devourer, Brandon urges people to confidently stand on the Word of God, anoint their homes, and recognize their absolute authority over demonic entities.

I've never been live on anything before. I thought I would try it. Let's pray together today. I just want to let you know I'm here for you guys. Do you see any questions? The thing is moving so fast I can't read it. Good morning from Nevada. Welcome, Nevada. Good morning from South Florida. Father, we thank you for the healing for the dog's eyes. South Africa—we speak life into those dogs' eyes right now in the name of Jesus. Good morning from London. Arkansas. Wow, that thing is moving fast, isn't it? North Carolina. Mary, Ellen, and Jack are all there. Edward and Edward Jack from Turkey are here. Well, Father, we just thank you for another great day, a time of worship and praise. We just give you all the glory and all the honor for all that you're doing in this earth. We thank you that you are mighty. What were you going to say, babe? Oh, nothing. Father, we just thank you for the Holy Ghost. We plead the blood of Jesus Christ over every single viewer today. We thank you, Father, for the anointing of the Holy Ghost that dwells on the inside of us. We thank you, Father, that we have great authority. Father, I thank you, Lord, that we are the salt in this earth. We thank you, Father, for the manifestations of the glory of God being on us, in us, and around us. I just feel in my heart, Father, I just thank you, Lord, that you speak through me right now. I thank you, Lord, that I'm anointed to do this, and I thank you, Father, that you've appointed me for such a time as this. I thank you, Father, for the supernatural manifestations of the glory of God right now. Father, I decree and declare healing over these people's bodies. We thank you, Lord, for the manifested presence of God in their houses right now in the name of Jesus. Whatever they have need of today, Father, I thank you that you're meeting their needs. Father, I thank you from the top of their heads to the soles of their feet, they're healed from any disease or any kind of infirmity. I thank you, Father, that you said in your word that by the stripes of Jesus, they are healed. I thank you, Father, that they are delivered from addictions of all kinds. Father, if it's drugs or alcohol or perversions of any kind, I thank you that you've delivered them from that. You became sick for us so that we don't have to have sickness and disease. I thank you, Father, that your word is true. We believe, Father, for great manifestations in these last days and for a great outpouring of your spirit on your people. Father, we're not afraid of the terror by night, nor for the arrow that flieth by day. Father, I know what you told me and what you showed me is coming. But greater is he that is in us than he that is in the world, and we're not afraid of those things, Father, for we walk in authority over them. And we thank you, Father, that you've given us great boldness in these last days. That glorious outpouring will flow over these people, Father. And I thank you, Lord, that when they go into the grocery stores or the gas stations, the light of God would shine on them like it did on Moses when he had that burning bush experience. The glory of the Lord would be manifested on their faces. The glory of the Lord would resonate all over them. And Father, when they go into these places—even in the schools or whenever they go into the church—the glorious outpouring of your spirit would be made manifest on them. I thank you, Father, that it would be a Shekinah glory cloud that would fill the very atmosphere. In these big seeker-friendly churches, Father, where they have to have the fog machines and the skinny jeans, we show up with the glory. I thank you, Father, that the glory would start to manifest and that people would start having creative miracles in their lives. That's what we're believing for—creative miracles. Father, I thank you, Lord. You showed me those angels and they came out of heaven, and you showed me the great outpouring of these new mantles that we've never seen before. I'm believing for the manifestation of the things that you showed me, Father, for the glorious church—that we don't walk in fear or torment, but we walk in the glory and the fire. I thank you, Father, for this. I thank you that there is a great manifestation of that fire on us for this last outpouring. It's just on my heart to believe for our president right now and for the people who are in power over us, Father, for the exposure of sin and for the corruption to be uncovered. Father, I thank you that the righteous would come forth and run for office and that our nation would turn around as a whole. Father, I thank you. The intercessory prayer starts to hit me really hard. I just thank you for the anointing of the Holy Ghost for all the needs that are here today. But Father, for this nation and for our nations—for Australia and the prime ministers, to the people in Canada who are so desperate for a move of God—for the oppression that has been on these people, I thank you, Father, that you're the way maker. You're able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. Oh Father, we thank you for the Holy Spirit; He dwells in us richly today. We thank you, Holy Spirit, and we invite you into this prayer time. We need you. We can't do this without you. We are desperate for more, desperate for revelation knowledge. We thank you, Father, for Ephesians, that the eyes of our understanding would be enlightened. Father, create in us a clean heart, oh God. Bring that fire on our lives and burn out the chaff. Thank you, Father, for the creative miracles. I thank you, God, for the manifestations of your glory on their lives. Lord, we just believe for the greater works. I'm believing for great and mighty things to take place. Honey, do you have any questions today? Carla is asking for prayers for her friend Nicole, stage four cancer. Father, we just pray for Nicole right now. We take authority over cancer right now in the name of Jesus. We command it to bow its knee. She will live and not die in the name of Jesus. And we pray over Robert. We thank you, Lord, no cancer comes nigh them. We call the doctor's report to turn around right now in the name of Jesus. We have authority over cancer. We command it to die in the name of Jesus. We call those rebellious cells to line up with the word of God. We command you to line up right now; in the name of Jesus, you have no right to be in that body. We command you to die right now in the name of Jesus. Cancer has to go right now in the name of Jesus. We thank you, Father. We have authority over this. We call complete healing and manifestation of healing over their bodies in Jesus' name. We believe this and we believe we receive this in Jesus' name. Over Robert and—I lost it, I'm sorry. Well, whoever it was, we just believe with them right now in Jesus' name. Gary? Do we have anybody else? Somebody else said Gary for cancer. Gary's healed of cancer. I stand with Gary. Gary is healed in Jesus' name. Kaylee is asking for prayer for her sister Shannon. She can't walk. Brain injury. Father, we speak to brains and to any kind of damage. Carla for another brain injury; she said numbness on her right side after brain surgery. Okay, we call Carla healed. We call their brains healed in Jesus' name. Numbness, go in Jesus' name. We call healing and wholeness over their bodies in Jesus' name from the top of their head to the soles of their feet. We call Carla healed. We call the brain injuries healed and any damage healed in Jesus' name. We thank you, Lord, for the creative, miracle-working power flowing through that brain right now in Jesus' name. You got a super chat and he's saying he's having a tough time leaving the pill addiction. The Lord has been tugging on me for the past few weeks really hard and convicting me. I just want to be full with the Holy Spirit fire. Okay, thank you for the little super chat thing; I appreciate that. That's a blessing. Cortez family. Okay. And so, Father, I just thank you, Lord. Faith calleth those things that be not as though they were. And we thank you, Father, that he is delivered from this demonic spirit of pill addiction. Father, I thank you, Lord, that whatever the opioids—all the things that try to create new things in the brain, the hormones in the brain—Father, I thank you, Lord, that he is delivered from this right now. I pray for every person on here that has an addiction to something, for that is a chemical imbalance. All those hormones and all the stuff that the body tries to mess up with these pills—Father, I thank you that they are delivered right now in the name of Jesus. Oh, I just saw something in the spirit when I was praying for y'all. What's the blue pill, babe? What's that blue pill? The one coming across the border? fentanyl. Yeah, fentanyl. I saw that pill in the spirit right now when I was praying. And so, we take authority over this pill in the name of Jesus. Father, if there are addictions to this, I thank you, Lord, that they are free from this in the name of Jesus; we believe we receive deliverance from fentanyl addictions in Jesus' name. And Father, I thank you that you're raising up a strong border on the southern border. Father, I know what you showed me—that the people are coming from over there. They don't even know why they're coming. They're coming and there's going to be a great outpouring of your spirit, and people are going to get delivered and set free in the name of Jesus. I thank you, Lord; what the devil meant for bad, you're going to turn it for good in Jesus' name. We believe that they are free and they're going to get even more free than they already are in Jesus' name. We're just believing for these people on here today that there's freedom coming to their lives. Freedom in Jesus' name. There's a whole bunch... somebody saying prayer for lungs. Elizabeth. Elizabeth, we call your lungs healed in Jesus' name. We call your lungs delivered from any kind of emphysema or COPD. It doesn't matter what it is. HIV—we call HIV healed and whole and well in Jesus' name. We speak to that virus. We command it to go from your body in Jesus' name. We call deliverance over that. Demonic hold over my children, for Julie. No more demonic hold over the children for Julie. Father, we call Julie free from that. Father, we thank you that we are calling her children free, for whom the Son has set free is free indeed. Julie is free. Her children are free. I stand in agreement with that right now in Jesus' name. Another HIV and then alcohol: Tanya and Mike. Mike, deliver from alcohol. Thank you, Lord. Tanya's delivered from alcohol and her companion, Mike. Father, we call Mike delivered. We call Tanya delivered from that spirit of alcoholism. We thank you, Lord, that they are delivered from that in the name of Jesus. Vince, double ear infection. Vince, we call his ears healed. Double ears, pop open in Jesus' name. No more blockage, no more pain, no more hurting in those ears. We thank you, Lord, that they are delivered from this in Jesus' name. Lexi, 16 years old with a mass in her lung. We curse masses in the lungs. We call masses healed and whole and well for Lexi. Father, we thank you, Lord. Lexi is delivered from this in Jesus' name. Does anybody have any questions? I just see lots of prayers. You got another super chat. Thank you for the super chat. Terry, that's a blessing. Terry and Black. Yeah. I don't see any questions. Does anybody have any questions about last night, about the video I made or anything like that? I really—after I delivered that word—as an intercessor, I pray over you all and the people of this channel a lot. I feel like you're my family. I feel responsible for you all by the words I deliver to you. For the people who are subscribed, I pray for you a lot and it's heavy on my heart that you understand how close we are to Jesus coming. They're talking about how the video is private and they can't view it. A previous one? Someone's talking about how long do we have to prepare. As far as being prepared, Samaria—I don't know how to spell her name—Samaria. As far as being prepared, you know, this is it, y'all. Whenever the Lord started speaking to me even about the gas prices and the things that were going to manifest, he warned me about $200 for a barrel of oil. He spoke to me about even the oil and Saudi Arabia joining up with Russia and the things taking place and them joining the BRICS nations. I saw that about May of last year, so of 2022. Thank you, Sparkle On. I appreciate that. I saw that back in May. So whenever I'm seeing in the spirit, there's a depth perception of things. You see in part, you hear in part. A lot of times the Lord will drop things in my spirit and say, 'Brandon, this is what's coming, and you need to intercede, prepare, and tell the people.' I wasn't even on YouTube whenever he spoke to me about this. I just started this YouTube channel and started posting videos here because he told me at the first of the year, "Brennan, I want you to start going on YouTube, making videos all the time, putting them on, and teaching the people the word and how to pray because they don't know how." When he spoke to me about the oil and told me it would go over $200 a barrel—like I said, it was back in May or so of last year—we're just now seeing the first blades of that. When he told me, he said, "August the 24th is a very significant day." I didn't know what it was about; he just said, "You need to pray over that day." That's the way he talks to me: he gives me cues to pray. So when I start interceding, he says, "Okay, so August the 24th." I started praying over it and told you all, "I don't know necessarily what's going to happen, or if anything. All I know is that we're supposed to pray over this day." Then Saudi Arabia and all those other countries are saying they're going to join the BRICS nations on the 1st of January. I was reading an article someone sent me on Facebook saying he's not going to increase oil production and they're actually going to go with Russia and slow production down. I was like, "Wow, that's amazing." We're seeing the fruit of that word. I don't know if we'll hit 200 really quick, but the price of oil and gas is going to go up based on what the Lord was showing me. Going back to when I think—because I don't want to go on a rabbit trail here—when do I believe this is going to manifest regarding the virus and all that craziness the Lord showed me? I believe we have time. I believe he tells me in advance to warn the people, and it's not going to happen tomorrow. I believe we would have a moment of time to be able to say, from what I feel in my spirit... It's not prophetically what I'm speaking to you all right now; it's what I feel in my spirit that the Lord is going to give us a season here. Whether it's a year, a year and a half, or two years, that's what I feel because I told you all when I was praying over 2024, he was speaking to me personally, "2024 will be the year you soar." It will start in September, which will be during Rosh Hashanah, and he said, "You will not be looking for this." I don't know if this was a personal word or for everybody, so you can receive it for you too, that the spiritual year for me would be starting in Rosh Hashanah going into Rosh Hashanah of 2023 to 2024, just praying over that here. I'm not believing for an economic fallout right on top of our heels. I know there were a lot of conspiracies and things about this fall, and as I tell you, I get pulses in the spirit when I'm praying. I feel like, "Oh, this is serious," and that's why I say, "How serious is it on a scale of one to ten?" "What's wrong, hun? Oh no, I thought you were looking at me for the next question." "No, I'm still trying to answer this one. It's probably too long of an answer; I've just never done this live." Going off those pulses, when I'm praying over something about the fall, do I feel like it's intense? That's why I told you all—and I'm never going to get political—there's going to be a big difference between the red states and the blue states. This is just being real with y'all. As far as the timing goes, I believe we have time to prepare. I know that I've seen things about crypto and I've not seen the full manifestations on those things. I believe he will always provide for the people who are listening, just like he did Joseph, or the woman who had her last little bit of bread and she sowed that to the prophet. Then the Lord blessed all she had and said, "Go and get all the pots you have," and she filled them all up with oil. God provided in famine. Isaac sowed in famine and reaped a hundredfold that same year. Look at all the things the Lord always does for his people for a way out. He doesn't catch his children off guard. It says he's never seen the righteous forsaken or his seed begging bread. If God did it in the Old Testament for his kids, how much more will he do it for you in his new covenant with us? He loves us. If he took care of them in the old covenant, he'll take care of us in the new. I'm just believing with all my heart that he's going to provide for us. I'm not believing that we're going to have the rug yanked out from underneath us and we'll be going, "Man, woe is me." We're the head and not the tail. I believe with all my heart that he's going to take care of his kids. I always want to come across with hope and faith, believing for an "exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think" kind of God, rather than a God who is out there beating people upside the head because he's angry. God is not mad at us. Like I told you, people are going to call this a great Ichabod. That's what the Lord showed me: people are going to say, "This is a great Ichabod" when all this starts to take place, that he's departed and left America. But I'm telling you, he said, "I never leave you nor will I ever forsake you. Lo, into the earth, I'll be with you always." He's in us, he sent us the Holy Spirit, and he's dwelling on the inside of us. Even in our darkest hours, he's there. Sometimes we go through tests because we're going through the refiner's fire. What the Lord showed me is coming is a cleaning; it's the potter's wheel. I talk about the clay on the potter's wheel all the time. It's a very serious time that we're coming into. The people who are listening to him, following the Holy Ghost, and seeking him daily will get revelation knowledge and you're going to hear whether what you're supposed to put your money into and how to invest, how to protect your family, and being frugal with what the Lord's giving you. It's not a time to be stupid with your money; it's a time to be wise and listening for him to be telling you to do things: helping your church out, helping out your fellow brother. I really believe with all my heart—and I'm not a financial adviser—I'll say that a thousand times. I am not someone who is out here to tell you how to invest your money, but he tells me things and shows me certain things. I believe with all my heart that if you're listening to him, there's going to be, like I said, I saw a number with 2%. It wasn't a lot of people, but there was a turnaround of things that will happen for folks if they're believing for him to take care of them. So, there you go on that. Edward, your potter friend, he gave you a super thanks and wanted to ask how long it was when the angel gave you the number of days, or how it happened. The angel... okay, I was in a dream where he said 569 days. That happened on October 2nd. 569 days. Whenever I had the dream, an angel came to me and he said, 'There is great judgment coming.' He said, 'In 569 days, there will be great judgment coming, but you are to pray and intercede.' I asked the angel in the dream, 'What is coming?' and he said, 'I cannot tell you.' He said, 'The Lord tells me you have to intercede and he will give it to you in pieces. He'll tell you in part and give you more as you pray.' So he told me it would be 569 days. That came about in August, and then the Lord told me, 'Brandon, I'm giving more time. I'm extending more time.' So whenever I'm seeing and hearing the Lord, like I said, it's just like when Abraham came before the Lord and was asking for Sodom and Gomorrah if there be 50 righteous. He kept going down and down, all the way to 10. Do you see how even in the old covenant, Abraham was a friend of God? Look how much grace he gave even to Sodom and Gomorrah. When you read the whole passage, it was terrible what was going on there. Yet God was willing even at that time to give mercy and intercede because Abraham was interceding for them. And look what he did. He was able to say, 'Listen, if there be just 10,' and there wasn't. I'm sure he was thinking, 'Surely there is more than that in there.' I bet even if he went down to one and it was just Lot—would you spare the city just for Lot? But he didn't go that far. Maybe that's all he felt in his spirit to go to. I believe with all my heart—going back to this because I keep going on these rabbit trails—when you are praying and interceding, you don't realize how much authority you have. When you spend time with the Lord and sit in his lap, curl up, and just love on him and worship him, you realize how much of a soft daddy he really is to his kids. He's not an ogre. He's not up there as a mad God beating people with rods. He loves on you. I'll come in and say, 'Hey, Dad, I'm coming into your courts.' I petition him in his courts all the time. 'Father, how's your day today?' and he'll go, 'Hey, Brandon, it's good to see you.' It's just the way we talk. I know he never leaves us or forsakes us, but he's excited because the way I petition him is by going into his courts and having fellowship in his throne room, just going in there, talking to him, and being his buddy. I want to be God's friend. You just got a super thanks from Sean. He asked, 'When you have your personal time with the Lord, do you speak out loud to him or is it all inside? Should we pray out loud? Peace be to you.' Yes, I speak to him like I'm talking to you right now. I'm not religious about this stuff. I think people treat God like the priests and the Pharisees; it's weird. Church doesn't have to be weird; Jesus is personal. When you start getting real with God, God gets real with you. People are always trying to be all religious and everything. Yes, we reverence him and respect him, and he is holy, but God is our Father and he loves us. We're his children. It says, 'You are my children.' How do you look at your children? You say, 'Please come up and crawl on my lap. I want to love on you.' That's how He is to us. He's our Father, he loves us, and people don't realize he's not mad. He just wants us to be his kids. Then someone asked if you might do an online Bible study. I'll pray about it. I'm not a big theology person. Like I've told you all, I have learning disabilities that I've overcome with reading and writing. So I listen to a lot of my Bible. I push the button and it plays, and I follow along. I'm just being open and real with you all. As far as studying the Word, I love to read the book of Ephesians. I love Hebrews, Romans, and James. I read them over and over again, letting the Bible read to me. You got an interesting comment from Anita. She said, 'Here in Australia, banks aren't allowing people to get cash out, many bank branches are closing, and we're losing ATMs. Some people have to travel over two hours to get to a bank.' It's just the beginning. The Lord told me—remember when I told you all I saw the flag on the pole and the dollar turn? It was a hundred-dollar bill on the pole, split down the middle. It was moving, but it started to fade out. I really believe that's what we're about to see. I believe when Saudi Arabia starts to go full swing with the BRICS nations and we see all those countries from the UAE and Egypt join, 80% of all the oil wealth of the world will join the BRICS nations by January 1st. That's huge because the petrodollar is in trouble if that happens. I'm not here to... what, babe? I thought you were looking at me. No, I'm just looking at you because you're looking at me, and I don't want to say anything because I'm on a live stream. I'm going to get myself in trouble. I'm like, 'Are you rebuking me?' No. You're doing great. I get nervous because I don't want to get in trouble. I'm your secretary, just waiting for you to tell me when you're ready for the next one. Anyway, I really believe we're going to start to see a shifting. In January, the Lord said to me, 'You will start to see the beginning of the digital dollar in 2023.' And he said, "It will not come; it will not be the full manifestation of it. You'll just start to hear little bits and pieces, and you're going to start to see that." And that was in January because the Lord always gives me a word at the beginning of the year. It says, "This is what it's going to be." But he said, "This is not going to be a bad year." He said you'll see interest rates go up; he talked to me about that. He talked to me about the war in Ukraine and things like that. I don't want them to kick me off here, so I don't know what I can say or what I can't say. My son edits a lot of stuff out; it helps me. He was showing me what was going to happen for this year and whether it would be a bad year or not. I didn't feel there would be a lot of drama. Like I said, I started seeing a lot of people sending me stuff saying, "Well, they're saying it's going to be bad this fall." But honestly, I haven't felt a real caution. As I've told you all, I make sure it's not the spirit of forebodings. People don't understand what that is—it's like torment and fear. It's like you're always walking around with that heaviness of going, "Oh no, what's coming?" but I don't want to live that way. So I think, making sure, "Is this the Holy Spirit telling me to do this, or is this a spirit that's trying to torment me in fear?" Walking around like this heaviness going, "Oh no, woe is me. Something bad's going to happen." When I pray over the fall, I don't feel that great heaviness. Usually, I get that if the Lord's telling me something's about to happen—something urgent and imminent. It's fixing to happen about September or October—a caution, a warning to pray over things. What I do see is a shifting in the Democratic Party. I'm waiting for their superstar to come on the scene, and I'm praying over that person. I believe I know who that is, but I don't think it is wise to get into all that today. I think it would be really stupid. I told you that the indictments will go clear into the summer of 2024, and that's going to be very serious. All the stuff with Trump—I saw praying over his life and for him. Going into the fall of 2024, the Lord had me praying for the elections. In 2025, I saw a lot of darkness, y'all. I saw a dam of stuff that was held back, and everything that was being held back was going to be released in 2025. I saw a sludge of all kinds of poo; it was bad. That's why I'm telling you all to be prepared. 2025 is a very serious year. 2026 is a very serious year for prayer; that's when I feel the caution. But in 2024, I don't feel a lot now. That might change. I get new stuff all the time from the Holy Ghost praying, so I don't focus on what I don't know. I focus on what the Lord has told me. If he hasn't warned me about it, I'm not even going to focus my attention on it because he always warns and speaks to me about what's coming. He shows me, and if he isn't poking me in that direction, then I go, "Whatever, who cares?" Even with people asking me about Taiwan and all that, I don't feel anything about that either. I'm praying over that and interceding for it. Someone sent me that thing about that guy on InfoWars telling people to pray over all this stuff, but I don't feel a great caution in my spirit. I'm very sensitive about this stuff—it's all about Jesus. He shows you if you seek him and have a relationship with him; he will tell you things to come. It's not like being drunk. I know a lot of people try to be flaky and weird about stuff, but I'm talking about being filled with the capacity of the Holy Ghost that nothing's going to move you. Do not allow the spirit of heaviness of what you see and all the drama of the world fill you up. You watch the news too much. Enough's enough. I've got to turn this off.' And that's where I get a lot. The Lord told me at the beginning here, 'I want you to stop looking at all the news as much as possible, Brandon.' Yeah, you can look at stuff and that's why I watch Stephen Gardner. You know, I watch his channel and he gives a summary of the news of the day. So yeah, when you get a bad report, whenever you see in the spirit and you see drama coming, that's the time to start praising and worshiping in your house. Putting worship on, putting praise on, and getting in the word, you know? And know that greater is he that is in you than he that is in the world. And I'm not moved by what I see. I'm not moved by what I feel. I'm moved by what the word of God says. And he said he would protect me; he knows so much he knows even the hairs on my head. He knows everything about me. He knows my future better than I know my past. He has a perfect plan for me. The steps of the righteous are ordered by the Lord. And so I'm believing I'm righteous with the Lord. I don't let all that fear inside of me. I have to separate myself from the visions that I see and not allow that to come on me. I say, "You know what, Lord? I believe with all my heart. I haven't told you all this—do you want me to tell you a really cool testimony I had? I always say, "You aren't touching me unless I know you." Let me tell you this: I was sitting in the middle of this room and a massive angel with humongous sausage fingers—like those Vienna sausage fingers—came and put his hands on me just like this. He put his hands around my head and a lightning bolt—I saw it in the spirit—hit me. It's not a full manifestation of an angel walking in a room; that's only happened twice in my life. Whenever it did, the power of God was so thick I crumbled like a sack of taters right there. When the manifested presence of God comes into your house, the power of God is so strong I cannot even stand up because the anointing settled on my legs and I just fall on my face because of the glory of the Lord. This time, I saw the angel in the spirit. He put his hands around my head like this, and I could see his hands touching my face. The power of God—the Holy Ghost lightning—went boom, and it knocked me out. The power of God came all over me and I was completely healed. Every angel looks so different. Not one looks the same. God is such a good God. He's so big. I just felt like I'd tell you all that. Abraham staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief but was strong in faith, giving glory to God. He was fully persuaded that what God had promised, He was able also to perform. For sickness, I have health; for poverty, wealth; for Christ has ransomed me. We're not begging Him anymore because He's already done it. Faith calls those things that be not as though they were. Don't doubt in your heart; you shall have whatsoever things you say, as in Mark 11:24. You need to get that inside of you. He said, 'I've given you power to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt you.' He's already paid the price for sickness and disease. He's already done it all. And if Jesus took all that for you, I'm not going to take it in my body. It's not mine. So you've got to resist it. Be steadfast. I resist it. When all else there is to do is stand, stand therefore. That's what you've got to do. I will not allow this sickness and disease to come on my body. I resist you in the name of Jesus. And Father, I thank you. I take authority over these circumstances. I command my thyroid to speak. I speak to my thyroid: 'Be healed and whole and well.' I don't have to be on medication anymore. I speak to this in the name of Jesus. I speak to my thyroid. And so when that power of life and death is in your tongue, you've got to speak over your situation. 'No weapon formed against me is going to prosper.' You've got to start believing in that. You've got to believe in the power and authority that Jesus has in you and that he's given you and how you rule and reign with him. You are seated with him in the heavenlies, far above all principalities, far above all powers, far above all of it. You are joint heirs with Jesus Christ. You're a son or daughter of the Most High God, joint-heirs with him. And when you have that power and authority on the inside of you, you're able to take authority over that devil and tell him to get under your feet. That's where he belongs. He has no power to come on you and hurt you. You've got to stand, though. And you know what? He'll come and test you. He'll come and try to knock you down with those waves of life. To devour somebody is to try to eat them all the way up, the whole of them, in just one bite. No, you aren't going to devour me. No, he rebukes the devourer for my sake. That's why I was trying to tell you all the importance of tithing. People want to get all upset; Malachi said, 'Oh, that's part of the old covenant.' No, listen. God's done everything he's going to do about the devil. He's already given you power over him. Now, we're all waiting for God to do stuff for us, but he's waiting on you.
